prompts.best_for: KPI dashboards, metrics showcases, performance snapshots, data-heavy results with multiple numbers
prompts.prompt: Modern corporate infographic dashboard UI design, modular bento box grid layout. Rounded rectangular cards with soft drop shadows on a light gray background. Color palette: vibrant azure blue and bright teal cyan accents against white. Top left: card with large green '450%' text and {{TEXT_PLACEHOLDER_1}}. Right side: large vertical blue card with white header '{{TEXT_PLACEHOLDER_2}}', subtext, and two building icons in white circles. Bottom left: teal gradient card with '80%' text. Bottom center: white card with blue '+50K' text. Bottom full-width card: profile avatar of a man with glasses, pill-shaped light teal text container reading {{TEXT_PLACEHOLDER_3}}. Clean, minimalist, flat design with slight depth, high resolution 4k. Do not generate lorem ipsum or filler text.
prompts.layout: Modular 'bento box' grid system. Three-column structure on top/middle merging into wider spans. Highly structured alignment with consistent gutters between card elements.
prompts.visual_hierarchy: 1. Large Blue Card (Right) - due to size and color saturation. 2. Teal Card (Bottom Left) - secondary color weight. 3. Large Data Numbers (450%, +50K) - due to scale and contrast.
prompts.focal_point: The large blue card on the right — due to size and color saturation — serves as the primary anchor, guiding the eye from right to left across the data points.
prompts.white_space: Ample inner padding within cards creates breathability. Negative space between the cards (gutters) is consistent, separating information distinct chunks.
prompts.balance: Asymmetrical balance. The visual weight of the large solid blue block on the right is counterbalanced by the cluster of three lighter/smaller cards on the left.

prompts.best_for: Statistical rankings, percentage breakdowns, bar chart comparisons, survey results, progress metrics
prompts.prompt: Professional corporate infographic design featuring a 3D isometric bar chart on a clean white background. Five vertical rectangular bars of varying heights in a gradient of blue shades, ranging from deep royal blue to bright teal. Each bar contains a white percentage number {{TEXT_PLACEHOLDER_1}} and a thin line icon at the bottom (speech bubble, edit, key, shield, life ring). To the right, a vertical list of five bullet points with circular radio-button style icons and text {{TEXT_PLACEHOLDER_2}}. Modern, minimalist vector style, flat design with soft shadows, high contrast, suitable for business presentations or financial reports. Soft studio lighting, 4k resolution. Do not generate lorem ipsum or filler text.
prompts.layout: Asymmetrical two-column split. The left and bottom 60% is dominated by the visual weight of the bar chart, while the right 40% contains a vertical list of text options. A standard modular grid appears to be used.
prompts.visual_hierarchy: 1. The tall dark blue bar (80%) grabs attention first due to color saturation and size. 2. The main headline 'business infograph'. 3. The remaining bars. 4. The list of text options.
prompts.focal_point: The leftmost, darkest blue bar (80%) serves as the primary entry point into the graphic.
prompts.white_space: Generous use of negative space (white) in the upper right quadrant and between the list items helps de-clutter the density of the chart elements.
prompts.balance: Asymmetrical balance. The heavy visual mass of the colorful bars on the left is counterbalanced by the lighter, textual density on the right.

prompts.best_for: Feature comparison matrices, multi-criteria evaluations, tool reviews, checklist-style assessments
prompts.prompt: Flat vector design corporate presentation slide featuring a comparison matrix table on a clean white background. The table has four horizontal rows with arrow-shaped headers on the left in a descending gradient of blue shades: dark navy, medium blue, teal, and light blue. Three vertical columns are topped with diamond-shaped icons: a document, a box, and a landscape image. The table cells contain status icons (checkmarks and crosses). Typography is modern sans-serif. Lighting is even, soft studio style. Text: {{TEXT_PLACEHOLDER_1}} main title, {{TEXT_PLACEHOLDER_2}} subtitle, row labels {{TEXT_PLACEHOLDER_3}}, column headers {{TEXT_PLACEHOLDER_4}}. Do not generate lorem ipsum or filler text.
prompts.layout: Structured grid system with 4 rows and 3 data columns. Left-aligned row headers act as anchors.
prompts.visual_hierarchy: 1. Row Headers (color intensity) -> 2. Top Icons -> 3. Main Title -> 4. Body Content.
prompts.focal_point: The gradient of blue row headers (Project, Planning, Execution, Control) on the left.
prompts.white_space: Generous margins around the table and distinct padding within cells creates a clean, uncluttered interface.
prompts.balance: Asymmetrical balance; heavy visual weight on the left (colored tabs) balanced by the grid structure on the right.
